blockers.policy: Only exact pinned commits are queried. A parser is unresolved only when that commit cannot be fetched or has no primary license/notice file at its grammar source root.

conservative_licensed_subset.aggregate_spdx: Apache-2.0 AND BSD-2-Clause AND BSD-3-Clause AND CC0-1.0 AND ISC AND MIT AND Unlicense AND WTFPL

excluded_parsers.reason: misidentified Cargo metadata names a different repository
NOASSERTION: exact Cargo MIT and package ISC declarations conflict
MIT declaration only: no pinned primary text
MIT declaration only: no pinned primary text
misidentified Cargo metadata names a different grammar repository
MIT declaration only: no pinned primary text
MIT declaration only: no primary text or release linkage
NOASSERTION: no governing declaration or license text at the pin
source/package identity mismatch: hjson repository declares tree-sitter-jsonc
MIT declaration only: no pinned primary text
BSD-2-Clause text is absent at the pin; omit instead of carrying historical supplemental text
MIT declarations only: published release points to a different commit
upstream issue 7 confirms the pinned code is unlicensed despite MIT package metadata

source_evidence_closure.fetch_method: git protocol v2, exact pinned commit, blob-filtered tree followed by exact license blobs
